text:
Not just numbers — a mathematician who counts where it matters: for people, for Europe.
#Future #Reason #Europe
reply: Absolutely! Mathematicians play a crucial role in shaping our society, not just through numbers, but by using their skills to create meaningful change. #Mathematics #ChangeMakers #EuropeFuture

text:
A mathematician for president. Rational, pro-European, human. He has my vote.
